name: torcida-pulse
description: Torcida Pulse — spoiler-safe TxLINE World Cup replay with momentum cards and Solana devnet provenance.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json
scripts.smoke:real: npm run build && npm run check:replay-manifest && node scripts/real-txline-smoke.mjs
scripts.smoke:real:env: npm run build && npm run check:replay-manifest && node --env-file=.env scripts/real-txline-smoke.mjs
scripts.smoke:real:browser:env: npm run build && npm run check:replay-manifest && node --env-file=.env scripts/real-browser-smoke.mjs
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run check:replay-manifest && npm run check:submission-packets && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:security && npm run smoke
